Title: Login Event - User Authentication
Preconditions: Valid user account; DevTools Console open
Assertions:
[STATE] gtm.load event present in dataLayer
[STATE] user_id set in GA config object
[FORMAT] currency field present in GA config
[FORMAT] language field present in GA config
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[CONSOLE] no JS errors during login flow
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx on auth API requests
[API] login GraphQL mutation returns valid userId
Failure_Signals: GA config event absent from dataLayer; user_id missing or null after login; currency/language fields missing from config

Title: view_item_list - Category Page
Preconditions: User logged in; DevTools Console open
Steps:
[NAV] navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/snacks
[WAIT] wait for product grid to load
[ASSERT] execute window.dataLayer.filter(e => e[1] === 'view_item_list') in console
[ASSERT] inspect returned event object
Assertions:
[STATE] event name = view_item_list present in dataLayer
[DOM] item_list_id field is non-empty string
[DOM] item_list_name includes category name
[FORMAT] items_skus is CSV string of product SKUs
[MATH] items_count matches number of visible products on page
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[CONSOLE] no JS errors on category page load
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx on catalog API requests
[API] GraphQL category query returns products array
Failure_Signals: view_item_list absent from dataLayer; items_count mismatches visible product count; items_skus empty or malformed

Title: view_item - Product Detail Page
Preconditions: User logged in; DevTools open
Steps:
[NAV] navigate to any product detail page on {{FRONT_URL}}
[WAIT] wait for product name and price to render
[ASSERT] execute window.dataLayer.filter(e => e[1] === 'view_item') in console
[ASSERT] inspect returned event object and items[0]
Assertions:
[STATE] event name = view_item present in dataLayer
[FORMAT] currency = USD
[MATH] value equals displayed product price
[DOM] items[0].item_id equals product SKU
[DOM] items[0].item_name equals product name
[MATH] items[0].price matches displayed price
[DOM] item_category hierarchy up to 5 levels present
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[CONSOLE] no JS errors on product page load
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx on product detail API
[API] GraphQL product query returns price and category data
Failure_Signals: view_item absent from dataLayer; value mismatches page price; item_category hierarchy missing or truncated

Title: select_item - Product Click from List
Preconditions: User on category page
Steps:
[NAV] navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/snacks
[WAIT] wait for product grid to load
[ACT] click on a product title link
[ASSERT] before navigation completes execute window.dataLayer.filter(e => e[1] === 'select_item') in console
Assertions:
[STATE] event name = select_item present in dataLayer
[DOM] item_list_id field is non-empty
[DOM] item_list_name field is non-empty
[DOM] items array contains clicked product details
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[CONSOLE] no JS errors on product card click
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx during navigation
[API] no GraphQL errors
Failure_Signals: select_item absent from dataLayer; item_list_id or item_list_name missing; items array empty after click

Title: add_to_cart - Add Product
Preconditions: User on product page; DevTools open
Steps:
[NAV] navigate to any product detail page on {{FRONT_URL}}
[WAIT] wait for Add to Cart button to be enabled
[ACT] click Add to Cart button
[WAIT] wait for cart badge to update
[ASSERT] execute window.dataLayer.filter(e => e[1] === 'add_to_cart') in console
Assertions:
[STATE] event name = add_to_cart present in dataLayer
[DOM] source_route matches current page URL
[FORMAT] currency = USD
[MATH] value equals product price
[DOM] items array contains added product
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[CONSOLE] no JS errors after add-to-cart click
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx on cart addItem mutation
[API] addItem GraphQL mutation errors[] is empty
Failure_Signals: add_to_cart absent from dataLayer; source_route missing or wrong; value mismatches product price

Title: view_cart - Cart Page Load

[ASSERT] execute window.dataLayer.filter(e => e[1] === 'view_cart') in console

[MATH] value equals displayed cart subtotal

Title: update_cart_item - Quantity Change
Preconditions: Product in cart; on cart page
Steps:
[NAV] navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[WAIT] wait for line items to render
[ACT] increase quantity of first line item using quantity stepper
[WAIT] wait for cart total to update
[ASSERT] execute window.dataLayer.filter(e => e[1] === 'update_cart_item') in console
Assertions:
[STATE] event name = update_cart_item present in dataLayer
[DOM] item_id equals updated product SKU
[MATH] new_quantity equals the updated quantity value
[MATH] previous_quantity equals the original quantity before change
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[CONSOLE] no JS errors on quantity update
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx on cart changeItem mutation
[API] changeItem GraphQL mutation errors[] is empty
Failure_Signals: update_cart_item absent from dataLayer; new_quantity or previous_quantity wrong; stale quantity values in event
Cleanup: Restore original quantity or remove item

Title: remove_from_cart - Remove Item
Preconditions: Product in cart; on cart page
Steps:
[NAV] navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[WAIT] wait for line items to render
[ACT] click Remove button on first line item
[WAIT] wait for item to disappear from cart
[ASSERT] execute window.dataLayer.filter(e => e[1] === 'remove_from_cart') in console
Assertions:
[STATE] event name = remove_from_cart present in dataLayer
[FORMAT] currency = USD
[MATH] value equals removed item price × quantity
[DOM] items array contains the removed product
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[CONSOLE] no JS errors on item removal
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx on cart removeItem mutation
[API] removeItem GraphQL mutation errors[] is empty
Failure_Signals: remove_from_cart absent from dataLayer; value does not match removed item total; items array empty or wrong product

Title: clear_cart - Clear All Items

[MATH] value = 0
[DOM] items array is empty
[MATH] items_count = 0
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[CONSOLE] no JS errors during cart clear

Title: add_shipping_info - Ground Shipping
Preconditions: In checkout flow; shipping options available
Steps:
[NAV] navigate to checkout shipping step on {{FRONT_URL}}
[WAIT] wait for shipping methods to load
[ACT] select Ground shipping option
[WAIT] wait for shipping selection to register
[ASSERT] execute window.dataLayer.filter(e => e[1] === 'add_shipping_info') in console
Assertions:
[STATE] event name = add_shipping_info present in dataLayer
[DOM] shipping_tier = Ground
[FORMAT] currency = USD
[MATH] value = 150 (Ground shipping cost)
[DOM] items array contains order line items
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[CONSOLE] no JS errors on shipping selection
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx on shipping update
[API] shipping mutation errors[] is empty
Failure_Signals: add_shipping_info absent from dataLayer; shipping_tier wrong; value not 150 for Ground
Cleanup: Deselect or proceed to next step

Title: add_shipping_info - Pickup (Zero Cost)
Preconditions: In checkout flow; Pickup option available
Steps:
[NAV] navigate to checkout shipping step on {{FRONT_URL}}
[WAIT] wait for shipping methods to load
[ACT] select Pickup shipping option
[WAIT] wait for shipping selection to register
[ASSERT] execute window.dataLayer.filter(e => e[1] === 'add_shipping_info') in console
NOTE: value=0 for Pickup is the CORRECTED behavior — was previously bugged to 150
Assertions:
[STATE] event name = add_shipping_info present in dataLayer
[DOM] shipping_tier = Pickup
[FORMAT] currency = USD
[MATH] value = 0 (Pickup has no shipping cost — BUG FIXED: was incorrectly 150)
[DOM] items array contains order line items
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[CONSOLE] no JS errors on Pickup selection
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx on shipping update
[API] shipping mutation errors[] is empty
Failure_Signals: add_shipping_info absent from dataLayer; value = 150 for Pickup (regression of fixed bug); shipping_tier wrong
Cleanup: Deselect or proceed to next step

Title: add_shipping_info - Switch Methods
Preconditions: In checkout flow; both Ground and Pickup options available
Steps:
[NAV] navigate to checkout shipping step on {{FRONT_URL}}
[WAIT] wait for shipping methods to load
[ACT] select Ground shipping option
[ASSERT] execute window.dataLayer.filter(e => e[1] === 'add_shipping_info') — verify shipping_tier=Ground and value=150
[ACT] switch to Pickup shipping option
[ASSERT] execute window.dataLayer.filter(e => e[1] === 'add_shipping_info') — verify latest entry has shipping_tier=Pickup and value=0
[ACT] switch back to Ground shipping option
[ASSERT] execute window.dataLayer.filter(e => e[1] === 'add_shipping_info') — verify latest entry has shipping_tier=Ground and value=150
Assertions:
[STATE] each shipping method change fires a new add_shipping_info event
[MATH] Ground events always have value = 150
[MATH] Pickup events always have value = 0
[DOM] no stale values from previous selection carried into next event
[MATH] total add_shipping_info events in dataLayer = 3 after all three selections
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[CONSOLE] no JS errors during method switches
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx on repeated shipping updates
[API] each shipping mutation call succeeds
Failure_Signals: events not firing on each switch; stale value from previous method persisting; value = 150 on Pickup (regression of fixed bug)

[MATH] value equals order total
[DOM] items array contains order line items
Cross_Layer_Checks:

Failure_Signals: add_payment_info absent from dataLayer; payment_type wrong or missing; value mismatches order total

Title: place_order - Order Submission
Preconditions: All checkout info filled — shipping and payment selected
Steps:
[NAV] complete checkout flow to final review step on {{FRONT_URL}}
[WAIT] wait for Place Order button to be enabled
[ACT] click Place Order button
[ASSERT] immediately execute window.dataLayer.filter(e => e[1] === 'place_order') before redirect completes
Assertions:
[STATE] event name = place_order present in dataLayer
[FORMAT] currency = USD
[MATH] value equals order total
[DOM] items array contains all order line items (may include gift items)
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[CONSOLE] no JS errors on order submission
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx on createOrder mutation
[API] createOrder GraphQL mutation errors[] is empty
Failure_Signals: place_order absent from dataLayer before redirect; value mismatches order total; items array missing gift items
Cleanup: Order is created — verify in admin if needed

Title: purchase - Payment Complete
Preconditions: Order with Payment Required status exists; Authorize.Net test card ready
Steps:
[NAV] navigate to the order detail page for a Payment Required order on {{FRONT_URL}}
[ACT] click Pay Now button
[WAIT] wait for payment form to load
[ACT] enter test card number {{TEST_CARD_AUTHORIZE_NET}} in card number field
[ACT] fill in expiry date and CVV with test values
[ACT] click Submit Payment button
[WAIT] wait for payment success confirmation page
[ASSERT] execute window.dataLayer.filter(e => e[1] === 'purchase') in console
Assertions:
[STATE] event name = purchase present in dataLayer
[FORMAT] currency = USD
[MATH] value equals order total
[MATH] shipping equals shipping cost
[MATH] tax equals tax amount
[DOM] items array contains all purchased line items
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[CONSOLE] no JS errors during payment submission
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx on payment API
[API] payment processor response indicates success
Failure_Signals: purchase absent from dataLayer after successful payment; event fires on place_order instead of after payment confirmation; value/shipping/tax mismatches order amounts

Title: Event Items - Product Structure
Preconditions: Any product event available; user on product page
Steps:
[NAV] navigate to any product detail page on {{FRONT_URL}}
[WAIT] wait for page to load
[ASSERT] execute window.dataLayer.filter(e => e[1] === 'view_item') in console
[ASSERT] inspect items[0] structure in the view_item event
Assertions:
[DOM] items[0].item_id equals product SKU
[DOM] items[0].item_name equals product name
[MATH] items[0].price is a number with correct value
[MATH] items[0].quantity is a number >= 1
[DOM] item_category fields present up to 5 hierarchy levels
[DOM] affiliation field equals vendor or supplier name
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[CONSOLE] no JS errors on product page load
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx on product detail API
[API] GraphQL product query returns category hierarchy and affiliation data
Failure_Signals: item_id missing or wrong; price not a number; category hierarchy truncated or absent; affiliation field missing

Title: Event Timing - Page Load Events
Preconditions: Performance tab open; fresh browser session
Steps:
[NAV] navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/snacks
[WAIT] wait for product grid to fully render
[ASSERT] execute window.dataLayer.filter(e => e[1] === 'view_item_list') in console
[ASSERT] verify event timestamp relative to page load completion
Assertions:
[STATE] view_item_list event present in dataLayer after page load completes
[STATE] event fires after product data is available (items array non-empty)
[STATE] event does not fire before product grid renders — no premature firing
[STATE] only one view_item_list event per page load (no duplicates)
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[CONSOLE] no JS errors during page load
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx on catalog API
[API] product list query completes before event fires
Failure_Signals: view_item_list fires before products load (items array empty); duplicate view_item_list events in dataLayer; event never fires

Title: Event Persistence - Multiple Actions
Preconditions: Fresh session; DevTools Console open
Steps:
[NAV] navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}
[WAIT] wait for storefront to load
[ACT] enter 'laptop' in search field and submit
[WAIT] wait for search results page to load
[ASSERT] verify view_search_results event in dataLayer
[NAV] navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/snacks category
[WAIT] wait for product grid to render
[ASSERT] verify view_item_list event in dataLayer
[ACT] click on a product to open PDP
[WAIT] wait for PDP to load
[ASSERT] verify view_item event in dataLayer
[ACT] click Add to Cart
[WAIT] wait for cart badge to update
[ASSERT] verify add_to_cart event in dataLayer
Assertions:
[STATE] view_search_results event present with correct search_term
[STATE] view_item_list event present with correct item_list_id
[STATE] view_item event present with correct item details
[STATE] add_to_cart event present with correct product data
[STATE] all 4 events appear in correct sequence in dataLayer
[DOM] no duplicate events of any type
[DOM] data values accurate for each event
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[CONSOLE] no JS errors across all navigation steps
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx on any API calls during session
[API] all GraphQL queries return valid data
Failure_Signals: any of the 4 events missing from dataLayer; events appear out of sequence; duplicate events fired; data from one event bleeds into another
